rules.name: S3 Bucket Public Access

rules.description: S3 bucket does not have versioning enabled for data protection

rules.description: S3 bucket does not have access logging enabled

rules.description: EC2 instance EBS volumes are not encrypted

rules.description: RDS instance does not enforce SSL for connections

rules.description: KMS key does not have automatic rotation enabled
